reference: I have never been to the dentist. I had one bad tooth that went into my inner ear and messed up my balance. I was not myself after that. I could not work out anymore because my muscles did not work the same; they did not work together like they are supposed to, leaving me uneven. I was badly stressed out, and then it led to issues with my genitals. They go up and down repeatedly. I can't describe all of it, but now it feels like I have blue balls. I have been suffering. Is this even possible? My ears pop and crackle all the time, and I have stuffed sinuses and infections like I have allergies. I don't please help me. No doctor can give me any good advice. Thank you for your time.
text: I have never been to the dentist. I had one bad tooth that went into my inner ear and messed up my balance. I was not myself after that. I could not work out anymore because my muscles did not work the same. They did not work together like they are supposed to, leaving me uneven. I was badly stressed out, and then it led to issues with my genitals. They go up and down repeatedly. I can't describe all of it, but now it feels like I have blue balls. I have been suffering. Is this even possible? My ears pop and crackle all the time, and I have stuffed sinuses and infections like I have allergies. I don't. Please help me. No doctor can give me any good advice. Thank you for your time.
